raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current scope","name":"Before we go further, what feels most solid in your role right now?","description":"Lets Ahmed set context by naming the parts of the role that feel stable before any growth pressure enters.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Level stretch","name":"What part of your role feels most like senior scope today?","description":"Surfaces where he is already operating at the next level rather than only talking about it.","purpose":"competency","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-level meaning","name":"What does senior scope mean to you in practice?","description":"Gets his own definition of the next-level product leadership role without drifting into generic traits.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Strategic ownership","name":"What kind of strategic ownership do you want to be known for next?","description":"Forces a concrete picture of the outcomes he wants to own at Head of Product level.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trust gaps","name":"Where does stakeholder trust feel thinnest right now?","description":"Identifies the specific relationships or moments where influence is not landing cleanly.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision framing","name":"What tends to get lost when you brief execs on a product decision?","description":"Surfaces weaknesses in narrative clarity, tradeoff framing, or the level of detail he defaults to.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Delegation boundary","name":"What work are you still holding that should probably sit with others?","description":"Tests whether he is acting like an individual executor in areas that should be distributed.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility tradeoff","name":"What would you need to stop doing to make more room for visibility and influence?","description":"Forces a trade-off between tactical delivery and higher-leverage leadership work.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"First growth move","name":"Given what we’ve covered, what do you want to change first?","description":"Closes the conversation by turning the discussion into one concrete next move.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
